title: LicenseDescription
description: Schema for LicenseDescription in Nuix REST API

source.description: Gets a string value identifying information about the source of the license.

type.description: Gets a string value identifying the type of license source.

location.description: Gets the location of the license.

shortname.description: Gets the short name of this license type.

count.description: Gets the number of licenses of this type which are currently available.

configuredCount.description: Gets the total number of licenses of this type regardless of the state.

description.description: Gets a longer description of this license type.

workers.description: Gets the number of workers available for use with licenses of this type.

configuredWorkers.description: Gets the total number of workers for the licenses of this type regardless of state.

canChooseWorkers.description: Tests if the client gets a choice over the number of workers.

audited.description: Tests if the licence is audited in any fashion.

auditThreshold.description: Gets the threshold for auditing in bytes.

expiry.description: Gets the expiry date of the license represented in milliseconds since the epoch.

features.description: A list of all enabled license features.

legalHoldHoldCountLimit.description: Gets the Legal Hold "hold count limit" from a license.

concurrentUserLimit.description: Retrieves the concurrent user limit from a license.
